name: Islamorada Key Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip together condensed milk and egg yolks until light and creamy at medium speed, about 8 minutes.
2. Add 1/2 cup lime juice.
3. Let the mixture rotate at low speed for about 1 second.
4. Fold a few times with a rubber spatula.
5. Pour into baked pie shell.
6. Let stand.
7. Beat separated egg whites with cream of tartar for a full five minutes.
8. Add sugar and beat another full five minutes.
9. Spread on top of the pie.
10. Brown in an oven at 350 degrees.
